texto: [But] I have come across anything so painfully beautiful as that kiss. I wish it was something I could save and share with the world so I could tell the universe: this is what it's like
autor: this is how it feels when you fall.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a this is how it feels when you fall.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “[But] I have come across anything so painfully beautiful as that kiss.
